Header.promptPurpose: Design a clean header section for an accordion/frequently asked questions page. It should have a title (FAQ or Similar), a subheading, and a search bar to filter questions. The header should be bold and centered. Use a light background with a soft gradient. Include an icon or illustration above the title.

Accordion.promptPurpose: Design an accordion/faq section with 5-8 expandable items. Each item should have a question and an answer that appears when clicked. Use plus/minus icons or down/arrow to indicate expandable state. Smooth animation for open/close. Use a clean and minimal style. Include a dark mode variant.

Footer.promptPurpose: Design a simple footer with multiple columns: logo/description, quick links, contact info, and social media icons. Include a copyright notice. Light background with dark text. Stacks on mobile.
